BNSS 316.title: Cheating (Equivalent to IPC 420)
rights: You have the right to consult and be defended by a legal practitioner of your choice.
You must be produced before a Magistrate within 24 hours of arrest.
warnings: This is a non-bailable offence. Bail must be granted by the court.

BNSS 35.title: Notice of appearance before police officer (Equivalent to CrPC 41A)
rights: You have the right to know the details of the complaint.
You are not required to be arrested if you comply with the notice.
warnings: Failure to appear before the police officer can result in arrest.
